title: When to Get Professional Help
drDigitalIntro: You don't have to fix every problem yourself. Get professional help when: the computer won.t turn on at all, the screen is cracked, a liquid was spilled inside, you hear grinding noises, or you've tried everything and it's still broken. The manufacturer.s support website offers chat, phone, and sometimes in-person help. Many community libraries and senior centers also offer free tech help. Asking for help is always the right call.

playgroundTask.question: You accidentally spill coffee on your computerBook keyboard. What should you do immediately?

options.text: Keep using it and hope it dries out on its own
Turn it off immediately, flip it upside down, and take it to a repair shop
Blow-dry it on high heat to dry the components quickly
Try reinstalling the operating system to fix the damage

drDigitalSuccess: Power off immediately and let professionals handle it — liquid inside a computer can cause serious damage if it stays on or dries in the wrong position.
drDigitalHint: Liquid and electricity don't mix. What's the first priority?
